summary: If a custom AscendC op works only after transposing a parameter in model_src, prefer changing the kernel to consume the parameter's native layout instead. Extra NPU transpose/contiguous ops before the custom call can fail in graph optimization with tiling_funcs NULL, so keep model_src free of layout-conversion ops and adjust host/kernel shape checks plus indexing to match the original tensor layout.
